macro.title: ERA president Alex Vidal tunes out real estate’s noise — and listens to consumers
macro.what: ERA’s Alex Vidal says consumer perception of buyer agreements and private listings is shaping agent questions more than industry headlines.
macro.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
macro.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

macro.title: Execution is the edge mortgage banks can control
macro.what: Atlantic Bay Mortgage Group adopted EOS to strengthen alignment, accountability and issue resolution across mortgage banking functions
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Why homebuilders struggle to scale new initiatives
housing.what: Despite the reputation production homebuilders get for resisting change – and failing at innovation – the best path to a homebuilding team member’s career advancement is by evangelizing a passion project
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: ‘Tale of two’ Miami housing markets reflects changing priorities, international demand
housing.what: Miami continue to house diverse housing ecosystems, including luxury and single-family segments supported by migration and limited supply.
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: From Bust to Boom: San Francisco Home Prices Are Now $1 Million Higher Than Housing-Crash Bottom
housing.what: San Francisco’s median home-sale price dropped to a low of $625,000 in the aftermath of the Great Recession; since then, it has risen over $1 million to more than $1.7 million
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: Pending Home Sales Fall to 3-Month Low
housing.what: New listings inched up week over week, but they’re near their lowest level since the start of 2026
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.

notables.title: Flair says AI improved lead conversion in West Capital Lending deployment
notables.what: Flair says West Capital used its AI voice agents in May, placing 318,000 calls, reaching 11,400 borrowers and creating 1,788 warm handoffs.
